// why this file: Build config used ONLY by the app-level Stryker run (app/stryker.config.json
buildCommand). Deliberately self-contained (no `extends`): the sandbox is a
copy of app/, so the ../../../tsconfig.base.json extends chain would break.
Compiler options mirror tsconfig.base.json + tsconfig.test.json, with two
- noCheck: Stryker's mutants are syntactically valid but often type-invalid;
we emit without type checking so every mutant actually RUNS and must be
killed by a test, not by the compiler.
- no declarations/sourcemaps: dead weight per sandbox build.
